name: Seafood with Ginger-Lime Dressing
recipeInstructions:
Seafood Salad:
1. Prepare the Ginger-Lime Dressing: Combine mayonnaise, parsley, lime juice, lime peel, and grated ginger in a blender. Blend until smooth. Stir in the plain low-fat yogurt. (The dressing can be made ahead and refrigerated up to 24 hours; it also pairs well with poultry or fruit.)
2. Toss the flaked lump crab meat (or surimi) with fresh lime juice and half of the Ginger-Lime Dressing. Place the seafood, salad greens, assorted fruit (halved honeydew melon, halved mangos), and sliced cucumber on a platter. Drizzle the remaining dressing over the top. Serve.
